query:
SELECT 
  l.id as liver_id,
  l.name as liver_name,
  SUM(b.duration) as total_duration_minutes,
  ROUND(SUM(b.duration) / 60, 1) as total_duration_hours,
  SUM(b.salesAmount) as total_sales,
  COUNT(*) as stream_count
FROM brand_livestreams b
JOIN livers l ON b.liverId = l.id
WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%'
AND b.livestreamDate >= '2025-12-01' 
AND b.livestreamDate < '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name;
